objective: Prevent downstream research from treating Tushare daily-only raw close as adjusted return data, and produce evidence of raw price discontinuities.
forbidden_actions: Do not create adjusted prices from raw close without adj_factor.
Do not allow portfolio backtest performance to use raw close returns.
Do not infer high-dividend or low-PE signals from daily-only data.
Do not call blocked Tushare endpoints in this task.
acceptance: Adapter raises explicit errors for adjusted return, total return, qfq/hfq close, valuation, and PIT membership capabilities.
Capability matrix marks raw daily allowed and adjusted/valuation/dividend research blocked.
Discontinuity scan creates evidence that raw close continuity can diverge from reported daily pct_chg.
Report states the exact downstream uses that remain blocked until adj_factor/stock_basic/daily_basic are available.
